title: my main question after just watching the End of Evangelion
display_title: my main question after just watching the End of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: my main question after just watching the End of Evangelion..             Quote Post by art_is_war » Fri Apr 22, 2011 4:10 pm I can't wrap my head around what the creator was getting at with Asuka's revelation which kickstarts her Eva. The only way I can reconcile this is that maybe she realized her mom's soul was in the Eva, I don't know. What are people's interpretations of this scene?

[]: Re: my main question after just watching the End of Evangeli             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Apr 22, 2011 4:33 pm art_is_war wrote: She realized her mom's soul was in the Eva

[]:             Quote Post by art_is_war » Fri Apr 22, 2011 4:52 pm see that was the only way it made any sense to me, I just don't recall them saying when that actually happened.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Apr 22, 2011 4:57 pm art_is_war wrote: see that was the only way it made any sense to me, I just don't recall them saying when that actually happened.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Apr 22, 2011 11:08 pm art_is_war wrote: see that was the only way it made any sense to me, I just don't recall them saying when that actually happened.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 23, 2011 2:57 am Not the usual question I was expecting... The thing that NGE does that makes it stand out -- and keeps sites like this going -- is that it doesn't have characters going "As we all know..." to explain things to the viewer. Rather, we must infer from what they do and say what the reasons are.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Apr 23, 2011 6:29 am Mr. Tines wrote: Not the usual question I was expecting... The thing that NGE does that makes it stand out -- and keeps sites like this going -- is that it doesn't have characters going "As we all know..." to explain things to the viewer. Rather, we must infer from what they do and say what the reasons are.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sat Apr 23, 2011 11:20 am liquidus118 wrote: Yup, take Yui in Unit 01 for example (One of the more obvious things, I know): - In episode 16 Shinji sees a ghostly vision of his Mother shortly before Unit 01 breaks out of Leliel. - In episode 20 Ritsuko says that the Eva contains a human soul. - In episode 20 we also establish that absorption in the Eva is possible since it happened to Shinji. - In episode 21 we are shown that Yui entered the Eva and this is apparently the moment before she disappeared forever. - In episode 24 Gendo explicitly refers to Unit 01 as Yui, asking her to be patient. Therefore: The human soul is Yui, who was absorbed in the flashback in episode 21 and protects Shinji as it does in episodes 2, 16 and 19. Then we just have to pay attention to Gendo's actions - especially in the flashbacks - to see how that impacted everything afterwards.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Sat Apr 23, 2011 11:56 am tomrule123 wrote: GOOD GRAVY, IT MAKES SENSE! So it was Yui's spirit that helped Shinji destroy the monster in episode 2 and somehow made EVA 01 gone beserk in 19! (and I now realize how Yui was killed during the experimentation... sucked into the EVA's soul.)

[]:             Quote Post by art_is_war » Sun Apr 24, 2011 12:36 am thanks guys, you've been really helpful. it's funny that you say that we are meant to infer a lot with this show, and I agree, but there are so many aspects in Eva that people -- even fans-- don't quite put together. I don't think most audiences are used to not being spoondfed exposition and having to make conclusions on their own. I think this makes Eva so great. But the friends who I've asked about the Asuka thing all said the same thing, how it was just the typical cheesy 'you were with me all along' moment, but that never sat right with me. I'm really glad it tied into the plot nicely afterall.

[]:             Quote Post by flapjack » Mon Apr 25, 2011 3:48 am bump

[]:             Quote Post by die-yng » Fri Apr 29, 2011 7:47 am tomrule123 wrote: GOOD GRAVY, IT MAKES SENSE! So it was Yui's spirit that helped Shinji destroy the monster in episode 2 and somehow made EVA 01 gone beserk in 19! (and I now realize how Yui was killed during the experimentation... sucked into the EVA's soul.) ...but I kind of knew about how Asuka got her strength and courage back in EoE... But the Yui thing I never figured out before! You've done it! You've made me learn an important aspect of EVA that I've never knew! You could call me an idiot for not realizing this sooner, but better to know now than never!

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Fri Apr 29, 2011 6:02 pm liquidus118 wrote: This also explains how Rei came into being. From what I know when Yui chose to remain in the Eva (Which Fuyutski says in EoE) the Eva still spat out a body - it just didn't contain Yui's soul since she stayed in the Eva. This was Rei - a human in flesh but without a soul. They then put Lillith's soul into the empty husk (I have no idea why) and thus we got Rei I.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 29, 2011 8:00 pm Jornophelanthas : Yes, the interpretation you mentioned is taken for fanon around here (and the Rei that the joined Eva-01/Lilith extracted was probably Rei 1). Although, it's interesting how Lilith apparently has Rei(?) legs sticking out from her long before the Spear is removed in Episode 15 and how the legs grow more once the Spear is removed in Episode 22'. Obviously the Spear halts Lilith's grow, but the deal with her legs and whether or not Rei bodies/clones are somehow grown from her is an interesting one. liquidus118 : Actually, the first time Kyoko says "Please die with me" amidst the "You must live" and "Don't kill her", it's something of a whisper. The second time is a very disturbing sounding scream/yell. ("Please...DIE WITH ME!" or "Issho ni...SHINDE CHOUDAI!") What's also interesting about the kooky versus sane part of Eva-02 is in EoE, we hear Eva-02 roar several times, eyes glow, and act in other ways that seem somewhat Berserk (long before Kyoko and Asuka die together by the harpies)... And there's also the interesting BGM title choices (which Anno titled) during Asuka's battle! (That happy/exciting piece that plays when Kyoko/Asuka reactive and fight the JSSDF, for instance, was titled "False Rebirth", by Anno.) Whether or not this means there was some joint control between Kyoko and Asuka or Asuka wasn't in as much control as she thought is anybody's guess and has been the subject of fan speculation many times. It's in some threads called "Bridge Theory", but the theory itself has been revised over the years by Reichu .

[]:             Quote Post by Someone » Sat Apr 30, 2011 10:53 am It am still recovering from this scene. They pretty much tore all her guts out.

[]:             Quote Post by superfreak110 » Wed May 11, 2011 9:46 am She realized her mom's soul was in the Eva thus giving her her confidence back making her able to sinc with the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Sun May 22, 2011 11:29 pm Someone wrote: It am still recovering from this scene. They pretty much tore all her guts out.

The only way I can reconcile this is that maybe she realized her mom's soul was in the Eva, I don't know. What are people's interpretations of this scene?
